title: Conscious Software Design - Video
summary: I have made a video explanation of my software design philsophy Conscious Software Design. In this video I go into more detail about what exactly this philosophy is all about. Hint: It's more about how to think about software design than about concrete techniques.
content:
I have made a video explanation of my software design philsophy Conscious Software Design.
                In this video I go into more detail about what exactly this philosophy is all about.
                Hint: It's more about how to think about software design than about concrete techniques.
